vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection, CMM for critical dimensions

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to sun exposure and internal cooling.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management through cooling channels and heat sinks.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load transfer through the wing spar.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and reinforce the wing spar if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of nacelle detachment due to inadequate snap fit.
risk.mit: Increase snap fit clearance or consider a bolted connection.

risk.desc: Potential structural failure at the wing spar socket.
risk.mit: Reinforce the wing spar socket with additional material.

risk.desc: Risk of landing gear detachment due to insufficient preload.
risk.mit: Ensure proper preload and torque during assembly.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

physics_paths.description: Nacelle loads are transferred through the wing spar into the fuselage spine.
Thermal loads from sun exposure are managed through the wing's surface materials and internal cooling channels.
Service paths for wiring and fluid lines are routed through the wing spar socket into the wing structure.

integration_opportunities.description: Wing spar socket integrates with fuselage spine to transfer loads.
Nacelle mount provides a robust connection for nacelle attachment.
V_tail mount ensures structural integrity and aerodynamic performance.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support: Horizontal orientation for FDM, vertical for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional accuracy, visual for surface finish

verification_focus.description: Verify load transfer through wing spar into fuselage spine.
Verify thermal management through wing surface materials and cooling channels.
Verify structural integrity of wing spar socket and nacelle mount.
